message.content:
(1) **Portrait Photo**: Yes, a portrait photo of a person is visible. It is placed on the **right side** of the hero section, within a distinct visual block.  

(2) **Photo Frame Style**: The photo is enclosed in a **rectangular frame** with a subtle, modern design. The frame appears to have a clean, minimalistic border (likely thin or integrated into the surrounding dark background) and is positioned to stand out against the dark backdrop, with the person’s face clearly visible.  

(3) **Text Elements on the Left Side**: The left side of the hero section contains:  
   - A large, bold heading: *“Ganiyu Al-Hassan Oluwaseyi”* (in a bright, eye-catching color, likely yellow or gold).  
   - A subheading: *“Software Engineering St |”* (smaller font, possibly in a lighter shade or white).  
   - A descriptive paragraph (smaller text, likely white or light gray) summarizing the person’s focus (e.g., “Crafting elegant digital experiences at the intersection of design, code, and creativity”).  
   - Two call-to-action buttons: *“View Projects”* (yellow, rounded) and *“Download CV”* (white or light gray, with an icon).  
   - Statistic badges (e.g., “40+”, “25+”, “4”, “10+”) in a smaller font, highlighting achievements (e.g., projects, clients, years, etc.).  

(4) **Overall Layout Style**: The hero section uses a **split layout** (left for text/content, right for the portrait photo). The design is modern and clean, with a clear visual hierarchy—text and photo are balanced to draw attention to both the individual and their professional identity.  

(5) **Colors Used**:  
   - **Background**: Dark (near-black or deep navy) for a sleek, professional look.  
   - **Text**: Bright yellow/gold for the main heading (high contrast against the dark background), white/light gray for subheadings and body text.  
   - **Buttons**: Yellow (for “View Projects”) and white/light gray (for “Download CV”).  
   - **Photo Frame/Portrait**: The photo itself has natural colors, but the surrounding frame/background matches the dark theme, ensuring the portrait stands out without clashing.  

The overall aesthetic is modern, professional, and visually striking, with high contrast between the dark background and bright text/buttons to emphasize key information.
